prompt: Create a photorealistic vertical 4:5 lifestyle portrait inside an ultra-premium Argentina national football team fan bedroom celebrating Lionel Messi winning the World Cup. A young Black male fan sits centered on the edge of a neatly made bed, facing the camera with a calm proud expression, wearing a white backward baseball cap, Argentina home jersey with sky-blue and white vertical stripes, black Adidas-style shoulder stripes, AFA crest, number 10 on the chest, white shorts, and bare feet. He sits casually with one leg folded on the bed and one foot on the warm wooden floor, giving a thumbs-up with his left hand. The room is modern, cozy, and editorial-quality, with cinematic warm lighting, blue LED cove lighting in the ceiling, shallow depth of field, realistic skin texture, detailed fabric, and premium interior styling. The bedroom color palette is Argentina sky blue, white, black, and gold. The bed has Argentina-themed bedding: a large AFA crest printed on the duvet, blue-and-white stripes, matching pillows, and crisp hotel-like styling. Behind the subject, create a dark charcoal feature wall filled with exactly 4 major wall displays: 1 large black AFA crest banner on the left, 1 framed action poster of Messi in Argentina kit running on the pitch, 1 central framed Argentina jersey display labeled “MESSI” with the number “10” and small photo strips beneath it, and 1 large framed poster of Messi kissing the golden World Cup trophy on the right. Add exactly 2 gold World Cup trophy replicas on a floating shelf behind the bed, plus 1 small football beside them. Add a softly lit floating shelf with warm underlighting, holding a few small framed memorabilia pieces. On the right bedside table, include exactly 1 small Argentina flag on a pole, 1 modern black-and-gold bedside lamp, 1 small framed photo, and 1 stack of books. Keep the scene luxurious but believable, like a high-end sports magazine editorial shoot. Use a natural 35mm lens look, vertical composition, realistic perspective, soft shadows, high detail, no cartoon effects, no distorted anatomy, no extra fingers, no text errors except the visible jersey label “MESSI” and number “10”.
